name: Frontier AI performance across the business disciplines: a case-grounded benchmark of knowledge work and analytical reasoning
summary: arXiv:2607.16057v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are improving rapidly as reflected in benchmark scores, yet these AI benchmarks largely test capabilities such...
description: arXiv:2607.16057v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are improving rapidly as reflected in benchmark scores, yet these AI benchmarks largely test capabilities such as factual recall, narrow question answering, mathematical problem-solving, and coding and agentic tool-use. What remains poorly measured is AI progress on the analytical knowledge work white-collar...
author: Ajay Patel, Kartik Hosanagar, Ramayya Krishnan, Chris Callison-Burch, Karim Lakhani
